title: Bottleneck-guided DSE
route: Use for PPA optimization when reports identify a dominant latency, II, resource, or memory bottleneck.
summary: Change only high-impact knobs for the current bottleneck, evaluate, and keep best-so-far rather than sweeping many pragmas.
anti_patterns: do not change many directives at once
do not ignore current best candidate
risk: May miss global optima but preserves budget.
